Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney John T. Burnite of Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker LLP 415-625-0990 for Defendants ParkMerced Investors Properties LLc, Sutro Management Group LTD and ParkMerced Owner LLc the moving party.
Attorney Robert C. Smith 415-294-1465 for Plaintiff YanPing Tan the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of DEFENDANT PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC,, SUTRO MANAGEMENT GROUP, LTD., PARKMERCED OWNER LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint; The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Motion is DENIED, request for punitive damages is sufficiently supported by factual allegations re: conscious disregard of Plaintiff's rights. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Reporter Tamra Keen, CSR #5404. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney John T. Burnite of Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker LLP 415-625-0990 for Defendants ParkMerced Investors Properties LLc, Sutro Management Group LTD and ParkMerced Owner LLc the moving party.
Attorney Robert C. Smith 415-294-1465 for Plaintiff YanPing Tan the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of DEFENDANT PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC,, SUTRO MANAGEMENT GROUP, LTD., PARKMERCED OWNER LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT;
The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: the Demurrer is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges all causes of action. Complaint sufficiently alleges duty and landlord-sub-tenant relationship. Complaint does not seek relief under PC 496 for both theft and PC 496. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Reporter Tamra Keen, CSR #5404. (501)
